name: golang-github-google-flatbuffers-dev
title: golang-github-google-flatbuffers-dev
description:
FlatBuffers: Memory Efficient Serialization Library (library)
FlatBuffers is a cross platform serialization library architected
for maximum memory efficiency. It allows you to directly access
serialized data without parsing/unpacking it first, while still having
great forwards/backwards compatibility.
.
This package contains the development files for Go(lang).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-google-flatbuffers-dev because FlatBuffers: Memory Efficient Serialization Library (library).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-google-flatbuffers-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-google-flatbuffers-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-google-flatbuffers-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
